product: Charlotte Tilbury Pillow Talk Dreams Come True Makeup Kit - Limited Edition 15-Piece Beauty Gift Set with Lip, Eye & Cheek Makeup Essentials in Iconic Nude-Pink Shades (15 Count)
description:
• 15-Piece Pillow Talk Treasure Chest - Unlock your dreamiest beauty secrets with this collector’s edition makeup set, featuring 15 full-size icons in the world-famous Pillow Talk nude-pink shade that flatters everyone, everywhere.
• The Complete Pillow Talk Look - From plumper-looking lips and fluttering lashes to cheeks that glow with love, every product works in harmony to create the signature, romantic makeup look.
• Hollywood-Inspired Vanity Case - Encased in a sumptuous velvet vanity box inspired by old Hollywood glamour, this keepsake makeup kit is designed to treasure and display your beauty icons in true Tilbury style.
• The Perfect Gift of Beauty Magic - A luxurious gift set for yourself or a loved one, this dreamy set makes every makeup moment feel magical, from everyday glam to red-carpet sparkle.
• Charlotte's Magic Story - Inspired by her iconic artistry and passion for innovation, Charlotte's mission is to empower everyone to look and feel like the most confident, beautiful version of themselves through makeup's transformative power. Charlotte Tilbury is highly regarded as an industry icon, trend trailblazer and beauty innovator across makeup, skincare and fragrance.

Famous for the signature STURMGLOW™, her skincare approach is inspired by her research into anti-inflammatory medicine and is uniquely non-aggressive. Her range of Molecular Cosmetics skincare, haircare and supplements is based on innovations in advanced ingredient science and potent natural extracts that strengthen, heal, and improve the skin.

product: Estée Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Foundation Makeup | Long-Wear Matte Foundation, 1 Fl Oz
description:
• ORIGINAL FORMULA: Available while supplies last. Discover the new flawless with NEW Double Wear
• ALL-DAY STAYING POWER: 24-hour wear. Sweat-, heat- and humidity-resistant. Lifeproof, waterproof foundation. Oil-free. Controls oil all day. 24-hour color true. Plus, it strengthens skin's barrier
• FRESH, MATTE FINISH: Buildable medium-to-full coverage foundation. Feels lightweight and so comfortable, you won't believe it's long wear
• OVER 55 SHADES: A wide range of shades that flatters all. Unifies uneven skintone and covers imperfections. Won't look grey on deeper skintones
• DERMATOLOGIST-TESTED: Oil-free, non-acnegenic. Won’t clog pores or cause breakouts. Ideal for normal to oily skin. Free of synthetic fragrances, gluten, parabens, phthalates, sulfites, drying alcohols, mineral oil-and animal-derived ingredients

product: Estée Lauder Re-Nutriv Ultra Radiance Liquid Foundation SPF 20 | Luxurious, Hydrating, Long-Wearing, 1 Fl Oz
description:
• LUXE LIQUID FOUNDATION: Recapture the radiance of youth. Skin’s energy and glow are reignited. Inspired by longevity science. With SIRTIVITY-LP technology. This Serum Makeup boosts skin’s energy. Creates a flattering, luminous veil on skin.
• VISIBLY EVENS SKINTONE: Imperfections seem to disappear: -14% instant reduction in the look of pores. (Clinical testing on 14 women.)
• HYDRATES SKIN: +28% instant moisture boost. Infuses 12-hour moisture to keep skin looking fresh and dewy. (Clinical testing on 14 women.)
• ENHANCES SKIN: The velvety fluid creates a flawless, perfected finish. Wears for 12 hours. Stays color-true. Long-wearing. Humidity-resistant.
• FORMULA FACTS: 12-hour wear. Color-true. Instant and lasting moisture. Sweat-resistant. Humidity-resistant. Covers pores. Non-streaking, non-poring, non-caking. Dermatologist-tested. Won't clog pores or cause breakouts.

product: Grande Cosmetics GrandeLASH-MD Lash Enhancing Serum - Peptide & Vitamin Infused Formula for Longer, Thicker, Fuller Looking Lashes - Ophthalmologist Tested, Cruelty-Free
description:
• LASH ENHANCING SERUM: Get naturally long eyelashes for a dramatic look or a more youthful appearance
• CONDITIONING TREATMENT: The conditioner gives your lashes a softer feel and helps prevent breakage
• VEGAN FORMULA: Infused with vitamins, antioxidants and amino acids; contains no sulfates or parabens
• OPHTHALMOLOGIST APPROVED: A safe and effective method to thicken and enhance your natural eye lashes
• 6 MONTH SUPPLY: Use our lash booster as directed and start seeing results in as little as 4-6 weeks
• Apply once daily on a clean, dry upper lash line only like a liquid eyeliner. Use only one dip for both lash lines. Allow 2-3 minutes to fully dry. Do not get into the eyes; in event of direct contact, rinse with cool water.
• An award-winning lash enhancing serum created with vitamins peptides & amino acids for the appearance of longer, thicker looking lashes in just 6 weeks with full improvement in 3 months.

product: Quelques Fleurs L'Original 250th Anniversary Edition
description: About the Designer: One of the oldest perfume houses in the world, Houbigant's history started in Paris in 1775, when Jean-Francois Houbigant hung a hand-painted sign of a basket of flowers above his small shop in the rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré. From the beginning, its fragrances found favor with royal families and the nobility. A collection of precious essences, composed by talented perfumers from high quality ingredients in Grasse, south of France, Houbigant Paris represents the elegance « à la française »

product: Satin Gold Lipstick with Diamond Powder - House of Sillage
description: About the Designer: At House of Sillage, luxury is not merely a word - it is a promise, a craft, and a legacy. Our fragrances are symphonies of the rarest essences, meticulously composed to transcend time and evoke the extraordinary. Each bottle, adorned with exquisite detail, is a masterpiece that marries scent with storytelling, designed to elevate the senses and honor the individuality of those who wear it. Our cosmetics are a celebration of beauty in its most refined form—silken textures and radiant hues that enhance your natural allure with sophistication and grace. Our candles, infused with opulent aromas, transform spaces into sanctuaries of warmth and serenity, illuminating the moments that matter most. Every creation is a testament to our relentless pursuit of perfection, blending innovation with timeless craftsmanship to deliver an experience that is as indulgent as it is unforgettable.

product: Lancôme Renergie Lift Makeup Foundation - Lightweight & Hydrating Formula, Medium-Full Coverage, SPF 27, Anti-Aging, Lifting & Firming, Up to 12H Wear
description:
• RADIANT MEDIUM COVERAGE: Lightweight foundation glides on smoothly, evens skin tone and texture, and provides a luminous finish.
• ANTI-AGING BENEFITS: Hydrates, firms, and visibly lifts skin for up to 12 hours with skin-loving ingredients like Caffeine, Vitamin E, and Iris extract.
• SPF 27 PROTECTION: Broad-spectrum UVA/UVB defense to protect skin against premature aging caused by sun exposure.
• SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Dermatologist-tested formula for dry, oily, combination, and sensitive skin, ideal for mature skin.
• LONGWEAR & TRANSFER-RESISTANT: Up to 12-hour wear that doesn’t cake, crease, or transfer; color stays true throughout the day.

product: Âme du Coeur Eau de Parfum Fragrance, 3.4 oz
description: About the Designer: Liquides Imaginaires is an artistic French fragrance brand established in 2011, whose creations are inspired by imaginary worlds, stories and legends. Through the use of unusual and unexpected ingredients, its founder Philippe Di Méo recreates mystical tales which evoke powerful memories and promote a transformative, spiritual mood through the power of perfume. Imagine a gateway to travel through time: going back to the memories retained in each fragrance, a mirror that stretches out to our dreams, our desires, our obsessions and our confessions.

product: Cap Camarat 75ml Eau de Parfum
description: About the Designer: Memo Paris was launched in 2007 by Clara Molloy and her husband John, with the desire to celebrate the beauty of the world through perfume, from its breathtaking places to the richness of its cultures. This curiosity for far-flung places and encounters reflects the founding couple: she, a Parisian-Catalan poetess, and he, a sporty Irish globe-trotter. Each fragrance forges its identity around magical, graceful destinations, inspiring creations with dedicated, high-quality raw materials. The most beautiful landscapes deserve the most beautiful natural ingredients, and the talented perfumers at Memo Paris have a rare freedom to express their creativity: the compositions they bring to life evolve on the skin with intensity and character, all in subtle nuances, like a perfumed journey, leaving a memorable sensation. Memo Paris has made its home at 24 Rue Cambon, in the 1st arrondissement of Paris, with creations also available in over forty countries or regions worldwide.

product: Obagi Nu-Cil Eyelash Enhancing Serum – Nourishing Lash Serum with Biotin for Thicker & More Defined-Looking Lashes
description:
• Nourishes Lashes for a More Luscious, Thicker & Defined Appearance: This eyelash enhancing serum is designed to target the anagen phase of the lash cycle to support overall improvement for results that continuously build day after day
• Powered by NouriPlex Technology: This proprietary blend of four high-performance ingredients – Biotin, Lipid Compound, Sodium Hyaluronate & Panthenol – gives our eyelash serum the effective boost you need for results
• Clinically Proven: 93% of participants said their eyelashes showed visible improvement, 89% said their eyelashes looked thicker and 89% said their eyelashes looked more densely packed after a 16-week blind study; data on file at Obagi Cosmeceuticals LLC.
• Dermatologist & Ophthalmologist Tested, Physician Endorsed: Formulated with the purest, most effective ingredients, our portfolio of products are dermatologist tested and physician endorsed; that’s why professionals trust us to provide superior skincare for their patients
• 35 Years of Transformational Skincare: From being the first to clinically test our products on all skin types & tones, to setting the standard for medical-grade skincare, we’re proud to bring you effective & transformative solutions for every step of your skincare journey

product: Hydrating Lip Serum
description: About the Designer: Founded by skincare virtuosos, Jami and Klaus Heidegger, Retrouvé is an anthology of over 75 years of collective experience, research, and collaboration and aims to nourish, restore, and unlock the skin’s true potential. Formulated over more than a decade and with clinically effective concentrations of anti-aging ingredients set in otherworldly textures, Retrouvé works harmoniously with the body’s natural regenerative processes to optimize the skin’s ability to hydrate, strengthen, and repair itself.

description:
• Physician Developed
• Ophthalmologist reviewed
• Dermatologist reviewed
